mapper.sql: notice_id AS noticeId, notice_title AS noticeTitle, employee_id AS authorId, notice_status AS noticeStatus, is_important AS isImportant, notice_views AS noticeViews, created_at AS createdAt, publish_start_at AS publishStartAt, important_end_at AS importantEndAt
mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.notice_title AS noticeTitle, n.notice_content AS noticeContent, n.employee_id AS authorId, n.notice_status AS noticeStatus, n.is_important AS isImportant, n.notice_views AS noticeViews, n.created_at AS createdAt, n.publish_start_at AS publishStartAt, n.important_end_at AS importantEndAt, a.attachment_id AS attachmentId, a.file_name AS fileName, a.file_size AS fileSize FROM notice n LEFT JOIN attachment a ON n.file_group_id = a.file_group_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE n.notice_id = #{noticeId} AND n.is_deleted = 0

SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, notice_title AS noticeTitle, notice_content AS noticeContent, created_at AS createdAt, important_end_at AS importantEndAt FROM notice WHERE is_important = 1 AND notice_status = 'POSTING' AND is_deleted = 0 AND (important_end_at IS NULL OR important_end_at > NOW()) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT attachment_id AS attachmentId, file_group_id AS fileGroupId, file_name AS fileName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, file_type AS fileType, file_attachment_uploaded_at AS fileAttachmentUploadedAt FROM attachment WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
